Family Owned in Greenwood

Building a Legacy, One Cart at a Time.

Legacy Cart Co. started as a father-and-sons project and grew into a passion for transforming golf carts into something people are proud to own.

We focus on honest recommendations, quality upgrades and a personal experience from the first conversation through pickup or delivery.
